description_long: This is a compact, modern cabinet or shelf unit with a rectangular shape and a distinctive striped pattern on its top and front surfaces. The structure features two open shelves, one above the other, providing accessible storage space. The sides and back are solid and finished in a matte black color, while the edges and legs are made of a lighter, wood-like material, adding a touch of warmth and contrast. The legs are angled outward, giving the piece a stable stance and a contemporary look. The interior of the shelves appears to be lined with a lighter, possibly metallic or laminate material, enhancing durability and visual interest. The overall design is minimalistic, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern street-side installations.
description: A modern, striped cabinet or shelf with two open compartments, black sides, and wood-accented edges and legs. Its minimalistic design and open shelving make it ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves with striped surfaces and wood-accented edges and legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid black panel with wood trim and two straight wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a solid back panel with subtle striping and wood-accented legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid black panel and wood trim.
